message:
fix(demo): fix hyperlinks display and title markup in emoji_links scene (bd-3im0)

- Fixed hyperlinks appearing on separate lines by using markup syntax
  instead of separate print_styled calls
- Fixed "Graceful Fallback" panel title showing literal [dim] tags
  by using title_from_markup()
- Removed unused Style import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
